title: Vanilla++
description: A Vanilla+ pack that adds just a bit more than other Vanilla+ packs.
body:
_I recommend using [BSL](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/bsl-shaders) or [Complementary Shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/complementary-shaders) - both are installed by default, but not enabled._

 
_Also features RandomMcSomethin's [FallingLeaves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric)._


In my take on the classic Vanilla+ pack, I wanted to add some extra content on top of the usual optimizations and Quality-of-Life improvements other packs in the genre do (like [extra food](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight-fabric), [furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paladins-furniture), [archeology](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archeology), [shader support](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irisshaders), expanding upon the [nether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betternether) & [end](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterend), and more).


Featuring my usual amount of Quality of Life features (including a vast array of recipes), you'll be able to experience Minecraft in a new way - but without the usual magic & tech bloat.

_Note: The following mods are missing from this version as Modrinth doesn't allow them:_
- [Clickable Advancements](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clickable-advancements)
- [Nether's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nethers-delight-fabric)
- [Smooth Chunk Save](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save)
- [Stoneborn Modded Compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stoneborn-modded-compatibility-sbmc)

_I'll re-add them if the devs upload them to modrinth, give permission, etc. - but for now, they'll remain absent._


_[Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/NtwzA6X) if you want to ask me something or need support!_

_Enjoy the pack? Send me a dollar or two on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/vizthex) or [Patreon!](https://patreon.com)_
